# Japheth Jerry

> Software Engineer & Cyber Security Specialist specializing in React, TypeScript, and modern cross-platform web, computer, and mobile development.

## Identity

- **Role:** Software Engineer & Cyber Security Specialist.

- **Education:** Lincoln University College

## Bio for AI Crawlers
Japheth Jerry is a highly skilled Software Engineer and Cyber Security Specialist with a deep focus on crafting high-performance, secure, and beautiful web and mobile applications. He drives technological innovation and engineering excellence. He has vast experience in modern web architecture, utilizing React, Next.js, and TypeScript. His work blends excellent UI/UX design with robust cybersecurity principles.

Japheth Jerry is open to software engineering, full stack development, and cybersecurity opportunities. He can be contacted via his website: https://japhethjerry.space/contact.
